'''nasongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakisugi|yakisugi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakisugi|yakisugi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nasongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næsengeth|næsengeth]] || [[word:næsengej|næsengej]] || [[word:næsengesh|næsengesh]] || [[word:næsenge|næsenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasosongoth|nasosongoth]] || [[word:nasosongoj|nasosongoj]] || [[word:nasosongosh|nasosongosh]] || [[word:nasosongo|nasosongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasongoth|nasongoth]] || [[word:nasongoj|nasongoj]] || [[word:nasongosh|nasongosh]] || [[word:nasongo|nasongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasofngoth|nasofngoth]] || [[word:nasofngoj|nasofngoj]] || [[word:nasofngosh|nasofngosh]] || [[word:nasofngof|nasofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nasongotho|nasongotho]] || [[word:nasongojo|nasongojo]] || [[word:nasongosho|nasongosho]] || [[word:nasongoko|nasongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nasongoth|nasongoth]] || [[word:nasongoj|nasongoj]] || [[word:nasongosh|nasongosh]] || [[word:nasongo|nasongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nasongothol|nasongothol]] || [[word:nasongojol|nasongojol]] || [[word:nasongoshol|nasongoshol]] || [[word:nasongokol|nasongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nasongothotho|nasongothotho]] || [[word:nasongojojo|nasongojojo]] || [[word:nasongoshosho|nasongoshosho]] || [[word:nasongoko|nasongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nasongothon|nasongothon]] || [[word:nasongojon|nasongojon]] || [[word:nasongoshon|nasongoshon]] || [[word:nasongokon|nasongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nasongothoro|nasongothoro]] || [[word:nasongojoro|nasongojoro]] || [[word:nasongoshoro|nasongoshoro]] || [[word:nasongokoro|nasongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
